_comment: Dell 12G backplane on LSI IT mode reports scrambled slots (known issue). This server is a clean mirror-reversal across 8 bays. If yours is an arbitrary permutation instead, delete reverse_slots and use an explicit 'map' of raw->physical, e.g. {"map": {"1:0": "1:7", "1:3": "1:4"}}. Calibrate with: b2ctl locate <serial>
